user.title: Roommate
user.description: Set up room presence automation. You can add rooms and configure settings after setup.

remove_room.title: Remove Room
remove_room.description: Select a room to remove. The integration will reload after removal.

room_sensors.title: Sensors
room_sensors.description: Configure sensors for {room_name}. Bed fields are optional, but at least a bed presence or occupants sensor is needed to enable bed automations.

room_devices.title: Devices & Features
room_devices.description: Configure additional devices and features for {room_name}. All fields are optional.

data_description.dim_brightness: Brightness level when getting in bed
data_description.recently_on_threshold: Skip dimming and turn off instead if lights were on for less than this
data_description.transition_dim: Light transition when dimming for bed
data_description.bed_exit_delay: Debounce delay before processing bed exit
data_description.bed_return_timeout: Window to restore previous room state on quick bed return
data_description.presence_off_delay: Debounce delay before processing presence off

global_settings.title: Global Settings
global_settings.description: Configure household-level sleep and illuminance settings.

data_description.sleep_lights: Lights turned off when everyone is in bed and turned on when someone gets up
data_description.sleep_modes: Switches activated when everyone is in bed and deactivated when everyone is up
data_description.illuminance_sensor: Skip turning on sleep lights when outdoor brightness exceeds the threshold
data_description.illuminance_threshold: Illuminance level above which sleep lights are not activated
data_description.sleep_light_transition: Fade duration when turning sleep lights on or off

error.bed_requires_sensor: Bed configuration requires at least a presence or occupants sensor.
error.invalid_name: Invalid room name. Use letters, numbers, and spaces.
error.room_exists: A room with this name already exists.
